title: adenocarpus intermedius var. viciosorum
intro: Adenocarpus intermedius var. viciosorum, also known as Vicioso or Intermediate Adenocarpus, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Adenocarpus intermedius var. viciosorum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically infused in hot water to create a tea, or dried and used in infusions or decoctions.
